content: Reference impl gdbrns/go-whatsapp-multi-session-rest-api (10 stars, whatsmeow-based, PostgreSQL-backed): uses JWT per-device auth (vs PerGo workspace+API-key multi-tenant model). 120+ endpoints (PerGo deliberately narrow = correct scope). 86 webhook event types with retries+per-device quotas (validates durable webhook consumer). TWO operational pitfalls the PRD omits: (1) 'Startup Reconnect Storm Protection' — concurrency limit + jitter + backoff needed when reconnecting 100s of paired devices on restart, else WhatsApp throttles/bans; (2) 'WA Web Version Auto-Refresh' — whatsmeow WA web version goes stale causing 'client outdated' pairing failures; needs SetWAVersion + auto-refresh. Admin endpoints for stats/health/device-status/batch-reconnect validate PerGo admin panel scope. PostgreSQL as WHATSAPP_DATASTORE_TYPE=postgres confirms whatsmeow PG backing in production.
